# 🎬 The Flagship Slate

**20 original film & series concepts — generated by the engine, then source-verified claim-by-claim.**

`$8.4B` combined Year-1 SOM · `167/200` external claims independently verified · `0` fabricated · `10 🟢 · 9 🔵 · 1 🟠`

[English cards](concepts/EN) · [Russian cards](concepts/RU) · [Slate metrics](SLATE_SUMMARY.md) · [Best ideas](BEST_IDEAS_VERIFIED.md) · [← Project home](../README.md)

</div>

---

> [!NOTE]
> This is proof-of-capability, not a pitch deck. Every concept below was produced by the
> [story-ideation-os](../README.md) engine: the prose is model-written, but **every financial
> figure is `python_executed`** (comparable-anchored, never written by a language model — ADR-0011),
> and **every external claim was independently verified** against a primary source before it was
> allowed to count. Dollar figures are frozen byte-for-byte; nothing was fabricated.

## Slate at a glance

Sorted by slate position. Grade reflects evidence density, not creative merit. **SOM** is the
`python_executed` Year-1 obtainable revenue for a single title. Click any title for the full card.

## What each card contains

| Section | What you'll find |
|---|---|
| **Masthead** | Logline, tagline, grade, and an at-a-glance TAM → SAM → SOM table |
| **📊 Market & Audience** | Market sizing, revenue thesis, and the cultural "why now" |
| **🎬 The Concept** | The universal theme, the genre convention it breaks, format & tone |
| **📖 Story** | Full synopsis, emotional arc, and the comparable-titles table (gross · budget · ROI) |
| **👥 Characters** | Protagonist, antagonist, key roles, series engine, and **verified proof of demand** with verbatim quotes |

## How the slate was verified

Every externally checkable claim in every card was handed to an **independent finder** (which had
to return a primary deep-link plus a ≤25-word verbatim value-on-page quote), then to an
**independent refute-by-default verifier**. Only claims that survived both were marked verified.

| Metric | Result |
|---|--:|
| External claims independently verified | **167 / 200** |
| Mean deep-link coverage | **88.8%** |
| Mean quote-bound coverage | **89.2%** |
| Fabricated claims | **0** |
| Grade distribution | **10 A · 9 B · 1 C** |

Full per-concept breakdown: **[SLATE_SUMMARY.md](SLATE_SUMMARY.md)**.

<sub>These are original concepts produced by the engine. Financial figures are model outputs of a
comparable-anchored revenue model, presented as analysis — not investment advice. Comparable data
derives from public sources (Box Office Mojo, The Numbers, MPA); see [NOTICE](../NOTICE).</sub>
